free_text: Investigation of the 28Si(a,p)31P and 28Si(a,d)30P
reactions at Ea=26 MeV.
The standard dE-E telescope consisting of
silicon surface-barrier detectors with the following
thicknesses: dE, 40.7 mu-m; E, 4700 mu-m.
The elastically scattered alpha-particles
were detected by a 1500 mu-m thick surface-barrier
silicon detector placed in the reaction plane on the
side of the beam opposite to the telescope.
The absolute values of the cross sections have been
determined by normalization to the known value of the
elastic cross section at the laboratory angle of 35
degrees taken from the reference of W.Zipper, thesis,
Jagellonian University,Cracow,1973,unpublished.
Experimental error of the absolute
value of cross section.
Error from the graphic bars. No source of
uncertainty is given.
Reaction record in Sub 004 was changed.

energy spectra averaged over energy bins 1 MeV is given
